meaning: adj.未经认可的,未经证实的
examples: Unconfirmed reports said that at least six people had been killed.
There are unconfirmed reports that Aziz will return to Moscow within hours.
There are unconfirmed reports of several small villages buried by mudslides.
Every day there are unconfirmed rumors about giant international banks in Europe like Societe Generale.
Nokia (NYSE: NOK) is expected to resume development of its unconfirmed Windows RT tablet.
